vulnerabilities.description: Sensitive data may leak through logs.
vulnerabilities.fix: Update the logger configuration to ensure that sensitive information such as request headers, environment variables, or JWT tokens are not logged.

vulnerabilities.description: Missing middleware for Helmet and CORS implementation for security.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet middleware to set HTTP headers for enhanced security and configure CORS with a proper whitelist to restrict Cross-Origin requests.
Implement rate-limiting middleware in the server configuration to limit the number of requests by IP in a specific timeframe.
